name: com.fidensa/mcp-server
description: Fidensa AI certification authority. Check trust scores, search certified capabilities, compare side-by-side, verify signed artifacts, and report runtime experience for MCP servers, skills, rules files, hooks, sub-agents, and plugins.

environmentVariables.name: FIDENSA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for full access (get_contract, compare_capabilities, verify_artifact). Free registration at https://fidensa.com/v1/keys. Not required for check_certification and search_capabilities.

environmentVariables.name: FIDENSA_CONSUMER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Consumer identity ID for submitting experience reports via report_experience. Register at POST /v1/consumers.

environmentVariables.name: FIDENSA_CONSUMER_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ECDSA P-256 private key in JWK format for signing experience reports.
